name: MiNK Therapeutics, Inc.
business: MiNK Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering the discovery, development and manufacturing of allogeneic, off-the-shelf, invariant natural killer T (iNKT) cell therapies to treat cancer and other immune-mediated diseases. The company's lead product candidate, agenT-797, is being evaluated in critical pulmonary immune failure, graft-versus-host disease, and solid tumors. The company also has preclinical engineered iNKT programs targeting BCMA and FAP.
sellsTo: patients with acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS)

exposures.sentence: We are employing iNKT cells in their native form, through our lead program agenT-797, in diseases where iNKT cells have demonstrated activity and accelerated approval pathways exist.

catalysts.event: Additional data from Phase 2 combination study of agenT-797 with botensilimab and balstilimab in gastroesophageal cancers expected
catalysts.sentence: Additional data are expected in early 2026.
